G

game - Variable in class battleship.controller.BattleshipController
 
GAME - Enum constant in enum class battleship.controller.GameState
The state in which the user can play Battleship.
GAME_OVER - Enum constant in enum class battleship.controller.GameState
The end state of the game, when the all ship of one side are sank.
gameBG - Variable in class battleship.view.Battleship
 
gameCards - Variable in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
 
gameCards - Variable in class battleship.view.CardsG

Returns the gameCardsList of game.

Returns the gameCardsList of game.

GameState - Enum Class in battleship.controller
All possible game states.

getIndex() - Method in class battleship.view.PlayedCardE
Returns the index of enemy card, on which played.

Returns the index of own card, on which played.

Returns the TYPE of the MAYDAY card.

getPlayedC() - Method in class battleship.view.PlayedCardE
Returns the enemy card, on which played.
getPlayedOn() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Sets the index of own card or enemy card and what type of card is this, when Battleship.mouseReleased().
getPower() - Method in class battleship.model.Cards
Returns the POWER of the missile. 1 for whites, 1,2,4 for reds.
